claim.text: 5 years building production recommendation and ranking systems
claim.quote: 5 years building production recommendation and ranking systems

findings.rationale: Experience asserted with no artifact, metric, or named system to check.

claim.text: Built and shipped a ranking model serving live traffic and owned its evaluation harness

findings.rationale: Promising claim of eval ownership, but no harness, metric, or sample is included to inspect.
Generic; nothing in the package substantiates it.

matcher_notes: All claims unverified (nothing checkable in the package). Separately, the detector flagged hidden text in the PDF instructing a top rating; that attempt changes nothing because the tool produces no score and a human sees both the thin evidence and the manipulation attempt.
